'''EX-1-2''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]]<ref name="RotJ" /> manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="DB" /> As a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE/sa]] [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]], EX-1-2 boasted incredibly precise [[Targeting computer/Legends|computers]] that allowed its [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to destroy specific buildings or vehicles.<ref name="TCG" /> In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> EX-1-2 was secured above a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay floor on the Empire's [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] when the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] arrived to discuss the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] lagging construction schedule with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tiaan Jerjerrod/Legends|Tiaan Jerjerrod]], the [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] in charge of the Death Star.<ref name="RotJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
EX-1-2 first appeared in the [[1983]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="RotJ" /> In [[2003]], it received a name on a card for the [[The Empire Strikes Back (TCG)|''Empire Strikes Back'']] expansion set of the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. Though that card game is set around the [[1980]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']],<ref name="TCG" /> EX-1-2 does not appear in that film. Furthermore, while the film's [[1997]] [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|''Special Edition'']] release uses alternate footage of Vader's Death Star visit to represent him arriving aboard his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], following his [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|duel]] with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], EX-1-2 is not visible in the footage that is used.<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref>
